text_preview:
- 01. REG. n. 021 

- 02. PLACE: Baía do Marajó – Canal do Navio.

- 03. DATA / TIME: 05 Nov 77 – 3:00 am

- 04. DESCRIPTION: Luminous body

- 05. COLOR: Yellowish

- 06. SHAPE: Undefined

- 07. APPARENT SIZE: …

- 08. MOVEMENT: Straight trajectory, coming from the South.

- 09. SPEED: Medium (-300Km / h)

- 10. ALTITUDE: Low

- 11. DISTANCE: 3,000m (estimated)

- 12. OBSERVER (S): Mr MARCELINO FERREIRA CARDOSO

- 13. NOTE: Landed in the water in front of the Colares lighthouse. A search beacon was triggered as if trying to locate the UFO (probably a passing boat), however, the rapporteur did
summary: Operação Prato reports 021–030: ten UFO sightings in Nov 1977 in Pará; report 024 records electrostatic/magnetic effects measured by theodolite; report 021/022 note apparent water landings.
